_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: The addition of PMO-IncE23a did not change the percentage of cells that generated neurites but clearly reduced neurite thickness
details: Successfully used for neurite thickness analysis in PC12 cells treated with PMO-IncE23a
